APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Defendant JAMES YAN-SIN LEE (Tel: 650-438-5426) in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER WELLS FARGO CLEARING SERVICES, LLC's Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

The Court indicates that the defendant did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petition granted as unopposed.

Order signed.
